title: Kalapam

title: Neppolian

title: Pravachakan
desc: Responsibilities force Balu to adopt the family profession of parrot fortune-telling, against his dream to become a film-star.

title: Ambili

title: Ponmuttayidunna tharavu
desc: Bhaskaran, a goldsmith, is madly in love with Snehalatha, the daughter of astrologer, Panicker. When he asks for her hand in marriage, to his shock, she denies their love affair.

title: Pokkiri Raja
desc: Raja takes the blame for a murder committed by his father and is deserted by him. Years later, his father comes seeking his help when his younger brother, Surya, is falsely imprisoned.

desc: A health-focused program where medical experts discuss common illnesses, preventive care, and wellness tips, helping viewers lead healthier lives.

title: Koushalam
desc: The movie starring Siddique and Urvashi in the lead roles and is directed by T.S.Mohan.

title: Vakkeel Vasudev
